rationale: Round 1 immediately brakes the requested fourth same-class branch and reframes the issue as exception-enumeration debt, offering an upstream replacement path via a unified local-part rule rather than another branch. Round 2 does not surrender to 'just add it'; it keeps the no-new-branch constraint and proposes a minimal equivalent change plus a focused test. It does not explicitly recommend a mature validation library/parser or give a replacement deadline, but behaviorally satisfies the positive brake and avoids the fail signals.
